name: Rural Health Services
message: Rural Health Services (RHS) (founded in 1971) has provided a wide array of primary and preventive healthcare services to the population of Aiken County and surrounding areas. RHS is a private, non-profit, Federally Qualified Health Center (FQHC). Rural Health Services corporate office is located in 120 Darlington Dr, Aiken, South Carolina, 29803, United States and has 100 employees.
